description_long: This is a futuristic, twin-engine airplane with a sleek, angular fuselage and a sharply pointed nose. The wings are swept back and mounted mid-fuselage, each featuring large, exposed turboprop engines with prominent propellers and nacelles. The tail section is equipped with twin vertical stabilizers and a horizontal stabilizer, forming an H-tail configuration. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel, all of which appear to be retractable. The cockpit is forward-mounted, enclosed with a tinted canopy, and features multiple windows for visibility. The exterior is primarily a matte gray with black and metallic accents, giving it a modern, high-performance appearance.
description: A sleek, twin-engine airplane with swept mid-mounted wings, exposed turboprop engines, and an H-tail. It features a forward, enclosed cockpit and retractable tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Rear view showing twin vertical stabilizers, large engine nacelles with propellers, and the full span of the swept wings.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, wing-mounted engines, and landing gear details.
description_view_2: Front view emphasizing the sharp nose, forward cockpit, and symmetrical engine placement on the wings.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to view 1, showing the opposite side's engine and landing gear arrangement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, swept wings with slight anhedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin turboprop engines mounted on the wings.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and a single horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main units and one nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a multi-window canopy.
